subcodes.first_line: O ye two noble and discerning souls! I beseech the Divine Majesty and fervently implore the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشخصان الرشیدان الجلیلان انی اتضرع الی العزه الالهیه و ابتهل الی العتبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @differences in human capacity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
